'''Tammarians''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] from [[Tammar]]. Because of the relatively small atmosphere on Tammar, Tammarians possessed air sacks which would allow them to survive in [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] for short periods. They also had intense fear of [[Water/Legends|water]], as Tammar was completely lacking in surface water. [[Ayddar Nylykerka]] was a Tammarian.
